RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants Diane Woolenweber and Allstate's demurrer to both causes of action in the complaint are sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk
